title: Account Balances Dashboard
description: The system shall display a dashboard screen showing all accounts with their name, type, and current balance, plus an aggregated total wealth figure. Balances shall be derived reactively from persisted transactions using Flow-based data streams.
acceptance_criteria: Dashboard loads and displays all accounts without manual refresh
Total wealth is the sum of all account balances
Adding a new transaction updates the relevant account balance within 1 second without screen refresh
Empty state (no accounts) shows a helpful prompt to create an account
